titleStmt.title: SII 23.102: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 102. (A.R. No. 102 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Nāgēśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple—on the same wall Mār. Sundara-Pāṇḍya I: year 5+1: 1220-21 A.D.

summary.p: This records a gift of 6(1/2) achchu by Ūyakkoṇḍāṇ Śrīvallabhadēvi a dēvaraḍiyāḷ (servant) of the temple of Nālāyira Īśvaramuḍaiyār for maintaining a perpetual lamp in the temple. The amount was invested with the Śivabrāhmaṉas of the temple who undertook to burn the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ
koṇāṭu koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrī cuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku
yāṇṭu 5- vatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu muḷḷināṭṭu pira
mateyam śrī rājarājaccaruppetimaṅkalattu teṉpiṭā
kai kallaṭaikuṟicciyil Uṭaiyār nālāyira Īccuram Uṭaiyār
koyil civappirāmaṇarom Iṉṉāyaṉār tevaraṭiyāril Ūyak
koṇṭāṉ civallapatevi Iṉṉāyaṉārukku cantirātittavaṟ celva
tāka taitta tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟukku cipaṇṭārattil Oṭukki
ṉa Accu 6i Ivvac cāṟaraiyum nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭu cantirātit
vaṟ celuttuvatākavum Aṉṟāṭu kuṭaṅkoṇṭu koyil pukuvā
ṉ celuttuvatāka camatittu kallile veṭṭikuṭuttom civa
ppirāmaṇarom caṭṭaṉ māṉaticcuraṉāṉa viranārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
poṉṉampi veḷḷantāṅkiṉāṉ tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Eccava
rākaṉ Āṇṭamālāṉa kotukulapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Umaiyāḻvāṉā
viṉkaṉṟāṉa niyāyaparipālapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu ciṟiyāṉ cevakattevaṉā
ṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyirapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu ciyaṉ perumāḷāṉa kirāmarācapa
ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Eccavarākaṉ mātevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu poṉṉampi Umai Āḻvā
ṉāṉa Āyirattaḷipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
